clocks.name: aos_bs
clocks.meaning: local Age of Sensing at BS

automata.name: A_CH
assumptions: measurements refreshed not later than T_meas + J_meas
class inputs are in declared enum ranges

automata.name: A_SIG
assumptions: MAC/SDN provides admissible waveform and pilot configuration
guarantees: waveform W is a variable, not a location

automata.name: A_BM
assumptions: beam commands and SSB/PRS configuration are finite and admissible
guarantees: recovery outcome no later than c_rec == D_BM
no c_rec > D_BM transition under BeamRecover invariant

properties.name: aggregation_consistency
properties.interpretation: normal state implies both aggregate booleans are ok

properties.name: ch_determinism
properties.interpretation: channel classifier has at most one enabled result

properties.name: sq_determinism
properties.interpretation: sensing classifier has at most one enabled result

properties.name: bm_recover_invariant
properties.interpretation: beam recovery never exceeds its invariant

properties.name: contract_ch
properties.interpretation: A_CH contract violation is absent under assumptions

properties.name: contract_sig
properties.interpretation: A_SIG contract violation is absent under assumptions

properties.name: contract_bm
properties.interpretation: A_BM contract violation is absent under assumptions

properties.name: contract_sq
properties.interpretation: A_SQ contract violation is absent under assumptions

properties.name: contract_ph
properties.interpretation: A_PH contract violation is absent under assumptions

invariants: A_PHY = A_CH || A_SIG || A_BM || A_SQ || A_PH
guards use finite class variables, not continuous PHY metrics
report/event channels are broadcast; command channels are handshake
bounded deadlines are checked by observers
limitations: base TA model does not prove radio-physical probabilities
base TA model does not optimize Pi_PHY
counterexamples may be physical scenarios or abstraction artifacts
parameter synthesis is out of scope for this MCP layer

sections.title: Измерительный слой, конфигурация и конечные классы

extractor.note: The extractor derives article structure, channels, class sets, queries, and evidence spans from LaTeX, then binds them to the canonical PHY IR. Full edge reconstruction from prose remains a separate hardening step.
